data.title: CNS Pharmaceuticals Announces Strategic Oncology-Neurology Realignment
data.description:
4th of July Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock powerful investing tools and data-driven insights with TipRanks Premium for more confident investment decisions.
  • Discover top stock picks and new investment opportunities through TipRanks' Smart Investor Newsletter.

CNS Pharmaceuticals ( (CNSP) ) has provided an announcement.

On July 2, 2026, CNS Pharmaceuticals posted a June 2026 investor presentation outlining a disciplined strategic reset anchored in oncology and neurology assets. Following a comprehensive review, management concluded that its historic focus on glioblastoma was not aligned with long-term growth and is now redirecting resources toward larger markets with strong investor interest and clearer commercial opportunities.

The presentation details rapid execution steps already taken in 2026, including appointment of a new CEO and full executive team, completion of a $22.5 million financing viewed as a top-performing PIPE, and initiation of a formal asset search. CNS plans to acquire underfunded or shelved clinical-stage programs with strong biological rationale, defined FDA pathways and near-term value inflection catalysts, while preparing legacy programs for out-licensing, positioning the company for faster development cycles and potential meaningful clinical or regulatory milestones within a year of acquisition.

The most recent analyst rating on (CNSP) stock is a Buy
with a $10.00 price target.
To see the full list of analyst forecasts on CNS Pharmaceuticals stock,
see the CNSP Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on CNSP Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, CNSP is a Neutral.

The score is primarily constrained by weak financial performance (no revenue, sizable recurring losses, and ongoing cash burn). Technical indicators are moderately supportive in the near term, and corporate events improve liquidity and leadership depth, but negative profitability and financing/dilution risk remain key headwinds.

To see Spark’s full report on CNSP stock,
click here.

More about CNS Pharmaceuticals

CNS Pharmaceuticals, Inc. is a biopharmaceutical company refocusing its efforts on high-unmet-need markets in oncology and neurology. Under a newly assembled, purpose-built executive team with deep expertise in drug development and public company transformation, the firm is targeting novel, differentiated assets with efficient development pathways and clear commercial potential.

The company is pursuing a lean, capital-efficient operating model aimed at acquiring clinical-stage or preclinical programs in established therapeutic areas with defined regulatory routes and limited treatment options. Legacy glioblastoma-focused programs, including TPI 287 and Berubicin, are being positioned for out-licensing to capture potential non-dilutive upside while CNS pivots toward larger, high-value indications.

Average Trading Volume: 1,455,004

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $6.84M

data.title: Nova Wins Tool-of-Record Slot for WMC Platform at Leading Foundry
data.description:
4th of July Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock powerful investing tools and data-driven insights with TipRanks Premium for more confident investment decisions.
  • Discover top stock picks and new investment opportunities through TipRanks' Smart Investor Newsletter.

Nova ( (NVMI) ) has provided an update.

Nova announced on July 2, 2026 that a leading global foundry has selected its Nova WMC™ platform as tool‑of‑record for multilayer measurement in the most advanced packaging processes. The decision followed a competitive evaluation and is expected to support multiple advanced packaging production flows at the customer.

The company said the win positions it for further deployment as the customer expands capacity and comes alongside accelerating adoption of WMC™ at several memory and foundry customers. Strong demand is being driven by the platform’s modular, customizable architecture, which handles warpage, complex shapes and varying surfaces while delivering high‑throughput, nanometer‑level mapping.

Chief executive Gaby Waisman noted that Nova WMC™ is entering a rapid growth phase, with customer uptake across advanced packaging and high‑bandwidth memory applications reinforcing Nova’s status as a trusted partner. The expanded use of WMC™ strengthens Nova’s foothold in cutting‑edge semiconductor packaging, with implications for its competitive positioning and growth prospects as demand for advanced chip architectures increases.

The most recent analyst rating on (NVMI) stock is a Buy
with a $600.00 price target.
To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Nova stock,
see the NVMI Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on NVMI Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, NVMI is a Neutral.

The score is driven primarily by strong financial performance (high margins and solid ROE), partially offset by increased leverage and uneven recent cash-flow momentum. Technicals are mixed with short-term weakness despite a positive longer-term trend, while valuation is a meaningful headwind due to the high P/E and lack of dividend support.

To see Spark’s full report on NVMI stock,
click here.

More about Nova

Nova Ltd., traded on Nasdaq and TASE under the ticker NVMI, is a leading provider of material, optical and chemical metrology and process control solutions for semiconductor manufacturing. Its portfolio combines high‑precision hardware and advanced software to help chipmakers improve device performance, increase yields and accelerate time to market across advanced fabrication and packaging processes.

Nova partners with semiconductor manufacturers worldwide from offices in key regions, positioning itself as an integral supplier to foundry and memory producers. By delivering state‑of‑the‑art measurement and inspection platforms, the company targets the most advanced semiconductor nodes and packaging technologies, reinforcing its role as a strategic technology provider in the global chip industry.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

data.title: Arcturus Therapeutics Announces Thermo Fisher mRNA Partnership
data.description:
4th of July Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock powerful investing tools and data-driven insights with TipRanks Premium for more confident investment decisions.
  • Discover top stock picks and new investment opportunities through TipRanks' Smart Investor Newsletter.

The latest announcement is out from Arcturus Therapeutics ( (ARCT) ).

On June 26, 2026, Arcturus Therapeutics entered a strategic collaboration with Thermo Fisher Scientific and its affiliates to support development of ARCT-032, its investigational mRNA therapy for cystic fibrosis, through contract research and manufacturing services. Under a master services framework, Thermo Fisher will contribute up to $40 million in clinical manufacturing for ARCT-032, while Arcturus will engage Thermo Fisher’s PPD unit for up to $40 million in clinical research services.

Phase 3 manufacturing, clinical trial supply, and related technical services will be provided under a project agreement that covers activities from technical transfer and engineering batches to fill-finish, release and stability studies. Subject to future regulatory approval of ARCT-032, Thermo Fisher would gain exclusive commercial manufacturing rights for a defined period, positioning Arcturus with integrated late-stage and commercial support for its cystic fibrosis program and reinforcing Thermo Fisher’s role as a key partner in complex mRNA drug development.

On July 2, 2026, Arcturus announced the collaboration publicly, highlighting Thermo Fisher’s Accelerator Drug Development model that combines manufacturing, clinical research and commercialization expertise. The deal underscores a trend in biotechnology toward comprehensive outsourcing of advanced mRNA programs, with potential operational and commercial implications for Arcturus as it advances ARCT-032 from Phase 2 toward Phase 3 and possible market entry.

The most recent analyst rating on (ARCT) stock is a Buy
with a $27.00 price target.
To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Arcturus Therapeutics stock,
see the ARCT Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on ARCT Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, ARCT is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by weak financial performance—shrinking revenue, large losses, and continued cash burn—despite a relatively low-leverage balance sheet. Technicals are neutral with longer-term trend weakness, while valuation is constrained by negative earnings and no dividend. The earnings call provides a meaningful partial offset via clinical/regulatory progress and stated cash runway, but operational and study-design risks remain.

To see Spark’s full report on ARCT stock,
click here.

More about Arcturus Therapeutics

Arcturus Therapeutics Holdings Inc., based in San Diego and listed on Nasdaq as ARCT, is a messenger RNA medicines company focused on liver and respiratory rare disease therapeutics. It leverages proprietary LUNAR lipid-mediated delivery, STARR self-amplifying mRNA technology and in-house mRNA manufacturing, and has developed KOSTAIVE, the first approved sa-mRNA COVID vaccine.

The company maintains a broad pipeline, including RNA therapeutic candidates for cystic fibrosis and ornithine transcarbamylase deficiency, alongside partnered mRNA vaccine programs for COVID-19 and influenza. Its global footprint includes collaborations with CSL Seqirus, U.S. BARDA for pandemic flu and a Japanese joint venture, ARCALIS, supported by an extensive portfolio of more than 500 patents and applications worldwide.

Average Trading Volume: 409,082

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $195.8M

On July 2, 2026, Alta Equipment Group announced that its board approved a quarterly dividend of $625 per share on its 10% Series A Cumulative Perpetual Preferred Stock, equivalent to $0.625 per outstanding depositary share trading on the NYSE under the symbol ALTG PRA. KE Holdings Inc. Sponsored ADR Class A ( (BEKE) ) just unveiled an announcement.

On July 1, 2026, KE Holdings approved the grant of 7,025,385 restricted share units to 649 non-executive employees under its 2020 Share Incentive Plan, with no purchase price and various vesting schedules ranging from immediate to up to 48 months. The awards, which use existing Class A ordinary shares held by the depositary bank and remain well within plan limits, are designed to reward past contributions, strengthen retention and more closely align employee interests with those of shareholders through long-term equity participation.

The compensation committee endorsed shorter vesting periods for some tranches to deliver immediate incentives, while maintaining staggered vesting over several years to support sustained performance and commitment. Following this grant, 120,160,322 Class A ordinary shares remain available for future awards under the plan, underscoring the company’s continued reliance on equity-based compensation as a strategic tool in talent competition within China’s real estate services industry.

data.title: Wallbox Finalizes Restructuring and Secures €15.8 Million in New Equity
data.description:
4th of July Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock powerful investing tools and data-driven insights with TipRanks Premium for more confident investment decisions.
  • Discover top stock picks and new investment opportunities through TipRanks' Smart Investor Newsletter.

An announcement from Wallbox ( (WBX) ) is now available.

On July 2, 2026 Wallbox reported completion of the equity financing tied to its court-approved restructuring plan, raising about €11.8 million from existing shareholders and the Generalitat de Catalunya’s IFEM vehicle, alongside capitalization of bridge-loan discount and PIK interest. The payments by reference shareholders were largely settled via set-off against a bridge loan, which was fully repaid, and participants received five-year warrants linked to the company’s Class A shares.

The company also closed a separate €4 million private placement on July 1, 2026 with new investor FOCUS ON NEXT FRONTIER, which subscribed for additional Class A shares on the same pricing terms and obtained matching long-dated warrants. Court approval of Wallbox’s restructuring became final and non-appealable on June 25, 2026, marking a key milestone that strengthens its balance sheet, improves liquidity and provides a firmer platform for executing its long-term business strategy.

data.title: Vaxart Reaches Governance Agreement, Ending Proxy Dispute
data.description:
4th of July Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock powerful investing tools and data-driven insights with TipRanks Premium for more confident investment decisions.
  • Discover top stock picks and new investment opportunities through TipRanks' Smart Investor Newsletter.

Vaxart ( (VXRT) ) has shared an update.

On July 1, 2026, Vaxart reached a cooperation agreement with a stockholder group that ended a proxy contest ahead of the 2026 Annual Meeting of Stockholders. The deal includes the withdrawal of the group’s director nominations and a joint search, within 90 days after the meeting, for a mutually agreed independent director to join the board and key committees.

Under the agreement, Vaxart will adopt director resignation and stock ownership policies, refresh board committee leadership, and establish new Stockholder Engagement and Clinical and Regulatory Affairs Committees. Management also committed to regular quarterly meetings with the stockholder group, while the company will reimburse up to $650,000 of the group’s expenses, marking a notable governance reset intended to strengthen board oversight and investor relations.

Spark’s Take on VXRT Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, VXRT is a Neutral.

The score is driven primarily by improved financial performance (profitability and free cash flow turning positive with low leverage), but is held back by weak technicals (downtrend with negative MACD). Valuation is supportive due to a very low P/E, while corporate events are moderately positive (incremental trial funding and runway actions) but tempered by prior funding reduction and potential dilution risk.

To see Spark’s full report on VXRT stock,
click here.

More about Vaxart

Vaxart, Inc. is a clinical-stage biotechnology company developing a range of oral recombinant vaccines based on its proprietary pill-based delivery platform. Its vaccines are designed to be stored and shipped without refrigeration and administered without needles, targeting diseases such as coronavirus, norovirus, influenza and HPV, with a focus on broad patent protection for its oral vaccination technologies.

The company aims to create oral versions of currently marketed vaccines and novel recombinant vaccines for new indications, including its first immune-oncology program, a therapeutic HPV vaccine. By emphasizing ease of distribution and administration, Vaxart is positioning itself in the vaccine market as a differentiated player focused on patient-friendly, scalable immunization solutions.

data.title: NIO Posts Surging Q2 2026 Deliveries and Strengthens Premium EV Lineup
data.description:

An update from Nio ( (NIO) ) is now available.

NIO reported strong operational momentum in June and the second quarter of 2026, delivering 40,597 vehicles in June, up 62.9% year-on-year, and 107,658 vehicles in the quarter, up 49.4%, with cumulative deliveries reaching 1,188,715 by June 30. The mix spanned its NIO, ONVO and FIREFLY brands, underscoring broad-based demand across premium and family segments in China.

On June 18, 2026, NIO rolled out the latest NIO WorldModel to over 700,000 users, becoming the industry’s first to synchronize intelligent driving system releases across general-purpose and in-house chip platforms. The upgraded three-layer training framework aims to improve handling of complex scenarios and human-like driving behavior, reinforcing NIO’s technology leadership.

In product performance, the NIO All-New ES8 reached 120,000 cumulative deliveries by June 22, 2026, confirming its strength in China’s premium segment above RMB400,000. A new five-seat ES8 version entered showrooms and presales on June 28, 2026, targeting further gains in the premium five-seat SUV category.

NIO’s ES9 also set a milestone, achieving 10,000 cumulative deliveries within 30 days of its May 28, 2026 launch and setting a record among premium battery electric vehicles priced above RMB500,000 in China. These milestones highlight NIO’s solid footing in the premium SUV market and bolster its positioning with investors and customers in the competitive Chinese EV landscape.

The most recent analyst rating on (NIO) stock is a Hold
with a $6.80 price target.

Coca-Cola Europacific Partners ( (CCEP) ) has issued an update.

On 2 July 2026, Coca-Cola Europacific Partners announced an update to its share buyback programme, confirming the launch of a second and final tranche of up to €500 million beginning 6 July 2026. This follows completion of a first €500 million tranche on 24 April 2026, bringing the planned total capital return to shareholders to around €1 billion.

The second tranche will run until 18 December 2026 at the latest and will be executed by Goldman Sachs acting as riskless principal across U.S. and London trading venues, within pre-agreed parameters and independently of the company. All repurchased shares, up to a maximum of 42,289,442 remaining under AGM authorities, will be cancelled, reducing CCEP’s issued share capital and potentially enhancing earnings per share for investors.

data.title: Molecular Partners and Orano Med Dose First Patients in MP0712 Phase 1/2a Trial
data.description:
4th of July Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock powerful investing tools and data-driven insights with TipRanks Premium for more confident investment decisions.
  • Discover top stock picks and new investment opportunities through TipRanks' Smart Investor Newsletter.

Molecular Partners ( (MOLN) ) has provided an announcement.

On July 2, 2026, Molecular Partners and Orano Med reported that the first patients have been dosed in a U.S. multicenter Phase 1/2a trial of MP0712, a DLL3-targeting Radio-DARPin carrying a lead‑212 payload. The program, conducted at five active sites and using a matched-pair imaging and therapy approach with 203Pb and 212Pb versions of MP0712, marks the clinical debut of Molecular Partners’ lead Radio-DARPin in small cell lung cancer and aggressive neuroendocrine tumors.

The initial cohort in the study is now fully recruited, with patients progressing to repeat dosing as investigators build the safety profile across up to four dose levels. Early readouts are expected within months and a fuller safety and efficacy dataset is planned for 2027, underscoring the partners’ intent to validate DLL3-targeted alpha therapy and to pave the way for a broader pipeline of Radio-DARPin and lead‑212-based oncology candidates.

By targeting DLL3, which is expressed in more than 85% of small cell lung cancer tumors and minimally in healthy tissues, MP0712 is designed to deliver high linear energy transfer alpha radiation directly to malignant cells while limiting off-target damage. Successful clinical validation would strengthen Molecular Partners’ and Orano Med’s positioning in the competitive radiopharmaceutical field and could open new treatment options in hard-to-treat neuroendocrine malignancies.

The most recent analyst rating on (MOLN) stock is a Buy
with a $12.00 price target.
To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Molecular Partners stock,
see the MOLN Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on MOLN Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, MOLN is a Neutral.

The score is primarily held down by weak financial performance (no revenue, large losses, and substantial cash burn). Technicals are broadly neutral and do not meaningfully offset fundamentals, while valuation is constrained by negative earnings and the absence of a dividend yield.

To see Spark’s full report on MOLN stock,
click here.

More about Molecular Partners

Molecular Partners AG is a clinical-stage biotechnology company specializing in DARPin therapeutics, a novel class of custom-built protein drugs designed to tackle medical challenges that are hard to address with conventional modalities. The Swiss-U.S. group focuses on oncology, including targeted radiopharmaceuticals and next-generation immune cell engagers, and advances both proprietary and partnered programs across preclinical and clinical stages.

Orano Med, a subsidiary of the Orano Group, is a clinical-stage biotech focused on targeted alpha therapies using lead-212-based radioligand treatments. With manufacturing and R&D operations in France and the U.S., the company is building a pipeline of 212Pb-linked cancer therapies and expanding GMP capacity in North America and Europe to support broader clinical deployment.

Molecular Partners leverages DARPin properties such as high affinity, specificity, small size, and tunable half-life to build multispecific and highly stable drug candidates. Its Radio-DARPin platform aims to improve radioligand therapy by enhancing tumor uptake and reducing kidney accumulation through half-life extension and surface engineering, positioning the firm as a technology leader in next-generation radiopharmaceuticals.

Average Trading Volume: 5,647

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: $154.7M

An announcement from Star Fashion Culture Holdings Ltd. Class A ( (STFS) ) is now available.

Star Fashion Culture Holdings Limited has called an extraordinary general meeting of shareholders to be held in Xiamen on July 13, 2026, with a record date of June 16, 2026, and has begun mailing proxy materials as of July 1, 2026. Holders of both Class A and Class B ordinary shares are invited to vote in person or by proxy on key resolutions that will shape the company’s future capital structure.

One major item seeks to revise previously approved terms for allotting up to 5,000,000 unissued Class B shares to Xingji Zhangpingting Limited, shifting the determination of consideration to a board-selected independent valuation institution over a three-year window from February 24, 2026. Another proposal would authorize an offering of up to 10,000,000 new Class A shares, the filing of a Form F-1 registration statement with the U.S. SEC, and broad powers for directors and officers to appoint placement agents, set pricing, and execute the necessary transaction documents, signaling a planned capital raise that could affect dilution, liquidity and the company’s market positioning.

More about Star Fashion Culture Holdings Ltd. Class A

Star Fashion Culture Holdings Limited is a China-based company headquartered in Xiamen, Fujian Province, and listed in the United States as a foreign private issuer. The group issues Class A and Class B ordinary shares and is positioning itself to access international capital markets through U.S. securities registrations and equity offerings.
